message:
web: Replace JetBrains Mono with SF Mono for monospace font

Remove JetBrains Mono dependency and use SF Mono as the primary
monospace font. Also update user message text wrapping to use
wrap-break-word instead of break-all for better readability.

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/jkk7itunjrwpcm8ryn0cg7zm
